case_title: DULCE MARGARITA MAGANA GUILLEN VS. EVELYN M. BALISTRERI ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF DULCE MARGARITA MAGANA GUILLEN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). DEFENDANTS EVELYN M. BALISTRERI AND FRANK G. BALISTRERI ARE NOT PRESENT. VALID PROOFS OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF ORALLY AMENDS HER COMPLAINT TO ONLY PURSUE HER PERSONAL LOAN. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, DULCE MARGARITA MAGANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, EVELYN M. BALISTRERI, FRANK G. $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00, PLAINTIFF IS ONLY PURSUING THE PERSONAL LOAN CLAIM AND AS SHE WAS GRANTED A FEE WAIVER, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY COSTS (IN THE AMOUNT OF $75.00) TO THE COURT.
